title: Education and awareness tools on violence and abuse - Canada.ca
content:
## Education and awareness tools on violence and abuse
Publications, tool kits and websites on dealing with violence and abuse for professionals and the public.

## Services and information

### Awareness materials for dealing with family violence
Explore awareness materials on family violence and abuse, including relationship violence, child mistreatment, elder abuse and violence against Aboriginal peoples.

### Information for children and youth on family violence
Discover how the law protects children from family violence. Includes content for ages 10 to 12 and 13 and older.

### Guidance for family violence prevention and response
Access tools and guidelines to help professionals and caregivers prevent and respond to family violence.
